Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7F85 "ROLLIN-0400-7F85" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rollin (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 to set a magic value of $60 (RTS) at $02FC before starting the game.
